name: Agent Manager
description: Tools for managing tasks, cron jobs, contexts, integrations, Gmail, Google Calendar, and the Garage feed via the Agent Manager API.

baseUrl.description: Agent Manager API base URL (default: http://localhost:8000/api)

productType.description: Product type — controls which tools are registered. 'garage' includes Garage feed tools, 'network_chain' includes chat delivery tools. Default: garage

serviceSecret.description: Shared service-auth secret sent as Authorization: Bearer on every Agent Manager API call. Must match OPENCLAW_SERVICE_SECRET on the Agent Manager server. Leave empty when the server hasn't enabled enforcement yet.
